toolbar.label: Settings
toolbar.subtitle: Tune transcription parameters and personal preferences. Remember to hit Save.

profile.title: Profiles
profile.hint: Save the current Settings as a named profile and switch between them with one click. The built-in 'default' profile can't be renamed or deleted.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Click a binding, then press the new combination. Esc cancels.

a11y.title: Accessibility
a11y.hint: Applied immediately and remembered on this device.

general.title: General
general.description: Python, models storage, and the folder to scan.

model.title: Model & Device
model.description: Pick a Whisper model and an inference device.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.description: Target language, translation mode, and prompting.

output.title: Subtitle output
output.description: Which formats to emit, where to put them, how to handle existing files.

vad.title: Voice activity detection
vad.description: Segmentation strategy — affects speed and boundary quality.

advanced.title: Advanced decoder
advanced.description: Fine-tuning for people who know Whisper internals; usually leave as-is.

pythonPath.description: System Python path — used only during first-time venv bootstrap. Leave blank to auto-detect (searches pyenv, Homebrew, system Python).
pythonPath.detectFailed: Still no Python 3 found — please specify a path manually.
pythonPath.label: Python path

uiLanguage.description: Interface language. 'auto' follows your OS locale; Chinese systems get Traditional Chinese, everything else gets English.
uiLanguage.label: Interface language

model.description: Whisper model to use. Larger models are more accurate but slower and bigger. Only models already downloaded from the Models tab appear here.
model.label: Model

models_dir.description: Directory where model weights are downloaded. Leave blank to use the system default (macOS: Application Support; Windows: %APPDATA%).
models_dir.label: Models folder

device.description: Inference device. 'auto' picks CUDA if available, otherwise CPU. macOS currently runs on CPU.
device.label: Inference device

compute_type.description: Model precision. 'auto' picks based on device. int8 is fastest and uses the least memory; float16 is slightly higher quality; float32 is the most accurate but most resource-hungry.
compute_type.label: Compute precision

vad.description: Voice activity detection strategy. The silero-vad variants cut out speech segments before transcribing, which is much faster and reduces hallucinations; 'none' sends the entire file to Whisper.
vad.label: VAD strategy

vad_merge_window.description: Silence merge window (seconds). Two speech segments separated by less than this gap are merged into one, preventing over-segmentation.
vad_merge_window.label: Merge window (sec)

vad_max_merge_size.description: Maximum merged-segment length (seconds). Segments longer than this get split so Whisper never receives an over-long chunk.
vad_max_merge_size.label: Max merged length (sec)

vad_padding.description: Padding (seconds) added before and after each detected speech segment, so the first/last word isn't clipped.
vad_padding.label: Segment padding (sec)

vad_prompt_window.description: Cross-segment prompt window (seconds). Whisper will be fed the last N seconds of the previous segment as context, helping it keep terminology consistent.
vad_prompt_window.label: Cross-segment prompt (sec)

language.description: Target language. Leave blank to let Whisper auto-detect; specifying a language usually gives more stable output.
language.label: Target language

initial_prompt.description: Initial prompt. A starting string fed to Whisper — useful for forcing specific vocabulary, writing system (e.g. Traditional vs. Simplified Chinese), or tone. Selecting a language auto-fills a sensible default.
initial_prompt.label: Initial prompt

initial_prompt_mode.description: How the prompt is applied. prepend_all_segments: every segment; prepend_first_segment: only the first; json_prompt_mode: read per-segment prompts from a JSON file.
initial_prompt_mode.label: Prompt mode

task.description: Transcription mode. 'transcribe' keeps the source language; 'translate' uses Whisper's built-in translate-to-English (no external API calls).
task.label: Mode

write_srt.description: Emit SubRip (.srt) subtitles. Widely supported across players. On by default.
write_srt.label: Emit SRT

write_vtt.description: Emit WebVTT (.vtt) subtitles. Useful for HTML <video> elements. On by default.
write_vtt.label: Emit VTT

write_txt.description: Emit a plain-text transcript (.txt) with no timestamps. Handy for reading or copy-pasting.
write_txt.label: Emit plain text

write_json.description: Emit raw segment JSON (.json) with per-segment timestamps, text and avg_logprob, so downstream scripts can post-process easily.
write_json.label: Emit JSON

output_dir.description: Where to write subtitles. Leave blank to write next to the source media; set a path to collect all output into one folder.
output_dir.label: Output folder

max_line_width.description: Maximum characters per subtitle line. Longer lines get wrapped. Leave blank to use Whisper's default.
max_line_width.label: Max line width

overwrite_policy.description: What to do when a subtitle file already exists. overwrite: replace silently. skip: keep the existing file, don't rewrite. rename-suffix: write alongside as .1, .2, … instead.
overwrite_policy.label: Overwrite policy

beam_size.description: Beam search width. Larger is more accurate but slower. Default 5. Set to 1 for a meaningful speedup when quality is already good enough.
beam_size.label: Beam size

best_of.description: When temperature > 0, sample N candidates per segment and keep the best. Default 5. Has no effect when temperature is 0.
best_of.label: Best of

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. 0 = deterministic. Whisper auto-ramps this up on fallback retries when it detects repetition/low quality. Default 0.
temperature.label: Sampling temperature

condition_on_previous_text.description: Feed the previous segment's text as the next segment's prompt. Keeps terminology consistent but can get stuck in loops; turn off if you see runaway repetition.
condition_on_previous_text.label: Use previous text as prompt

no_speech_threshold.description: 'No speech' probability threshold. Segments above this are treated as silence and dropped. Default 0.6.
no_speech_threshold.label: No-speech threshold

logprob_threshold.description: Average log-probability threshold. Segments below this are treated as low-quality and retried with fallback settings. Default -1.0.
logprob_threshold.label: LogProb threshold

compression_ratio_threshold.description: Compression ratio threshold. Above this Whisper flags the segment as repetitive/hallucinated and retries. Default 2.4.
compression_ratio_threshold.label: Compression-ratio threshold

media_root_path.description: Folder to scan for media. Scan recursively finds every video/audio file under this directory that doesn't already have a matching subtitle.

media_file_name.description: The current file's name. Automatically populated by the queue — you don't usually need to edit this.

media_file_path.description: Full path of the current file. Automatically populated by the queue — you don't usually need to edit this.

missing_count.description: Files remaining from the last scan. Automatically updated by the queue.
